---
title: "Academy"
subtitle: "Learn, collaborate, and grow with our educational programs"
from: markdown+raw_html
format:
  html:
    css: /assets/css/academy.scss
    classes: [academy-section]
listing:
  contents:
    - overview.qmd
    - courses.qmd
    - trainings.qmd
    - microlearning.qmd
    - programs/index.qmd
    - events.qmd
    - webinars.qmd
    - partnerships.qmd
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 12
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .ap-listing-hero { padding: 10rem 0 6rem; text-align: center; }
  .ap-listing-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4.5rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.045em; line-height: 1.06; }
  .ap-listing-hero .gr { color: #F5A623; }
  .ap-listing-hero p { font-size: 1.35rem; color: #86868b; max-width: 520px; margin: 1.5rem auto 0; line-height: 1.45; }
  .ap-listing-intro { text-align: center; padding: 3rem 0 1rem; }
  .ap-listing-intro h2 { font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .ap-listing-intro p { font-size: 1.05rem; color: #86868b; max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; }
</style>

<div class="ap-listing-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>chen.ist <span class="gr">Academy</span></h1>
    <p>Hands-on courses, trainings, and programs in cybersecurity, open-source, and digital skills.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-listing-intro">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Browse by category</h2>
    <p>Use the filters below to find what interests you.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.container}
:::
